ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genotypes" (
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genotype */,
  "genotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the genotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genotype */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the crop */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the genotype */,
  "parent_genotypes" TEXT /* Parent genotypes if applicable */,
  "resistance_traits" TEXT /* Description of resistance traits (e.g., disease, pest, environmental stress) */,
  "yield_potential" TEXT /* Estimated yield potential */,
  "nutritional_profile" TEXT /* Nutritional content of the genotype */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created or documented the genotype */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the genotype was created or documented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genotypes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agronomic_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the agronomic trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "trait_type" TEXT /* Type of trait (e.g., yield, quality, resistance) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the trait */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who defined the trait */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait was defined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agronomic_traits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yield test */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agronomic trait */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of the trait */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the result */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who verified the result */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES agronomic_traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
